title: Crusaide
excerpt: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
content: Crusaide plays with the idea of the mortality of an artwork confronted with the power of a transitory appearance, which is, by being restricted in time, much more intense.rnrnThis painting sometimes radiate a cold and latent violence. At times, disconcerting beauty emerges.
